highlight: Enterprise-grade demo video completed in two and a half days

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Enterprise-grade demo video completed in two and a half days: A finished video can be delivered quickly when requirements are clear
- Full MCP toolchain coverage: Speech recognition, voice-over, soundtrack, and other steps can be completed in an integrated workflow
- Mature open-source solution combination: Built on coordinated execution with Claude Code and multiple MCP services
- Tool selection is among the leaders: Core MCP components receive strong attention on platforms such as GitHub and Hugging Face

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Based on video materials recorded by the user and requirement settings entered in text, this solution automatically generates a presentation video with voice, subtitles, and background music.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Finance & Trade, Science & Education
**Category**: Service, Operations, Marketing
**Technology Category**: MCP tools, Computer Vision, Speech and Audio, ASR, TTS

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo development: 2.5 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Small and mid-sized companies consistently have strong demand for product function demos, but with limited budgets they often have to trade off between high-quality video production and high cost

- Traditional manual production of this type of video requires roles such as recording, editing, and sometimes soundtrack production and voice-over, resulting in relatively high labor cost, usually RMB 100-1500 per minute or even higher

- Traditional manual production takes a long time for editing footage and processing audio such as denoising, alignment, and soundtrack work, usually taking about 7+ days from preparation to completion
- If the finished video needs adjustment, traditional manual production makes revision relatively difficult

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Convert the original audio of the video into subtitles based on ASR technology
- Generate speech from subtitles based on TTS technology
- Generate background music based on subtitles and user instructions through music generation technology
- Integrate subtitles, speech, background music, and the original video to produce a new presentation video

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Faster delivery: When requirements are clear, an enterprise-grade demo video can be completed in as little as two and a half days.
- Complete toolchain: Key steps such as speech recognition, text-to-speech, and music generation can all be connected.
- Mature solution: Uses Claude Code to call multiple MCP services, with a clear and stable collaboration workflow.
- Leading selection: The MCP tools used are all in the high-attention tier on platforms such as GitHub and Hugging Face.

subsections.title: 3.1.3 Implementation Details
content: [Practice Details](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/Zb81wx72QiLt5xkCYO4cgzeen6g?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Audio, video, and subtitles stay synchronized, the video is clear and plays smoothly, and the output meets expected quality, ideally with added value such as soundtrack effects
- Response is timely during production and modifications are quick, with finalization completed within 1 week
- Production cost is controlled within RMB 1000
- Video duration is about 1 minute
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Character Error Rate (CER) <=5%
- Average recognition accuracy (Acc) >= 75%
- Average recognition speed (RTF) <= 0.5
- Subjective spot checks of speech naturalness pass
